task_completion.description: Increase the Inner Tube inner diameter to 24.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket component configuration window for the Inner Tube showing the inner diameter set to 24.0 mm (or 2.4 cm).

task_completion.description: Replace the motor configuration with an Estes E9 motor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket 'Motors & Configuration' tab showing an Estes E9 motor assigned to the rocket.

task_completion.description: Add a Mass Component of at least 15g inside the Nose Cone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket component tree showing a Mass Component nested under the Nose Cone, and/or its configuration window showing a mass of at least 15g.

task_completion.description: Increase the parachute diameter to at least 40.0 cm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket parachute configuration window showing the diameter set to at least 40.0 cm (or 400 mm).

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation to confirm safety.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket 'Flight Simulations' tab showing a completed simulation run with results such as maximum altitude and stability margin.
OpenRocket window title showing 'mid_power_upscale.ork', a save dialog with this filename in the correct directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

task_completion.description: Document the new motor, nose weight added, parachute diameter, and simulated maximum altitude in an upgrade report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'upscale_report.txt' located in '~/Documents/exports/', containing the Estes E9 motor, >=15g nose weight, >=40cm parachute diameter, and a simulated maximum altitude value.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket application open with various configuration windows being interacted with, rather than just a text editor modifying the .ork XML file.

integrity.description: Agent actually ran the simulation to obtain the maximum altitude.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket Flight Simulations tab with a completed run, and the altitude in the report matches the simulated altitude shown in the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created and saved the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor saving the file to the correct path, or terminal commands (like echo or cat) creating and verifying the file 'upscale_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target parameters: Inner tube diameter >= 23.5 mm (target 24.0 mm), Nose weight >= 15g (0.015 kg), Parachute diameter >= 38 cm (target 40.0 cm). Expected save paths: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/mid_power_upscale.ork and /home/ga/Documents/exports/upscale_report.txt.
